name: Fluffy Pineapple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of a 9 1/2 inch spring form pan with both packages of lady fingers.
2. In a bowl, mix together cream cheese, sugar, and half of the crushed pineapple using an electric mixer for about 1 1/2 minutes.
3. Add the remaining crushed pineapple to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Gently fold in the Cool Whip.
5. Pour the entire mixture over the lady fingers in the prepared pan.
6. Refrigerate for 5-6 hours before serving.
Note: This recipe takes just a few minutes to assemble and requires no cooking.
